violations.rule: A child must NOT call, reference, or depend on any sibling.
violations.details: TransformData reads from raw_data, which is produced by sibling IngestData. This creates an implicit dependency between siblings.

violations.rule: A child must NOT call, reference, or depend on any sibling.
violations.details: ValidateData reads from processed_data, which is produced by sibling TransformData. This creates an implicit dependency between siblings.

violations.rule: A child must NOT call, reference, or depend on any sibling.
violations.details: ExportData reads from processed_data and uses quality_score, which is produced by sibling ValidateData. This creates an implicit dependency between siblings.

violations.rule: Parent is the ONLY node that directly calls its children.
violations.details: OrchestratePipeline is a child but it calls other children (IngestData, TransformData, ValidateData, ExportData), violating the rule that only the parent calls children.

composition_feedback.suggested_fix: Remove OrchestratePipeline as a child and make it the parent. Redesign children to be independent functions that take all required inputs as parameters and return outputs, without relying on shared state or sibling outputs. The parent should call children in sequence, passing outputs as inputs to the next child.
